hero.title: Velesari Holdings
hero.subtitle: Private trading house and capital investment group focused primarily on Energy and Agriculture.
hero.body: Velesari Holdings allocates proprietary capital across commodity-linked systems where pricing is shaped by supply-demand balance, logistics friction, and counterparty quality.
hero.inBrief: Primary focus: energy systems and agricultural supply chains. Secondary coverage: metals, logistics, infrastructure, and operating partnerships.

domains.title: Primary concentration with selective secondary coverage
domains.intro: The firm concentrates where physical market structure can be measured directly and where risk boundaries can be set before deployment.

items.title: Energy (Primary)
items.body: Coverage across power, fuel, and transport-linked systems where storage constraints and route optionality influence price behavior.

items.title: Agriculture (Primary)
items.body: Coverage across agricultural supply chains where weather, crop cycles, processing throughput, and logistics determine imbalance risk.

items.title: Secondary Sectors
items.body: Selective focus in metals, logistics, infrastructure, and operating partnerships that alter commodity flow or execution quality.

revenue.title: Three deployment channels under one governance standard
revenue.intro: Capital can be expressed through market positions, strategic ownership, and operating partnerships when terms and controls are explicit.

pillars.title: Market Positions
pillars.body: Exposure to commodity-linked dislocations supported by clear structure signals and pre-defined risk limits.

pillars.title: Strategic Ownership
pillars.body: Longer-horizon ownership in assets or businesses tied to essential commodity throughput.

pillars.title: Operating Partnerships
pillars.body: Selective operating relationships where documentation, controls, and commercial alignment are verifiable.

method.title: Structured process from thesis to review
method.intro: Every commitment passes through the same sequence: structure assessment, downside definition, counterparty review, and portfolio supervision.

steps.title: Structure Assessment
steps.body: Thesis starts with supply-demand balance, inventory behavior, and physical bottlenecks.

steps.title: Risk Definition
steps.body: Position size, scenario range, and invalidation levels are set before execution.

steps.title: Portfolio Supervision
steps.body: Open exposure is monitored against assumptions and adjusted as evidence changes.

principles.title: Controls that shape allocation behavior
principles.intro: Controls are practical: they define how the firm sizes risk, selects counterparties, and reviews open exposure.

items.title: Counterparty Review
items.body: Legal terms, operating readiness, and settlement reliability are screened before commitment.

items.title: Risk Limits
items.body: Capital-at-risk thresholds and concentration boundaries are established ahead of execution.

items.title: Documentation First
items.body: Commercial terms and responsibilities are codified to reduce ambiguity during execution.

items.title: Review Cadence
items.body: Positions are reassessed with defined cadence rather than ad hoc interpretation.

nameMeaning.title: Privately funded. Privately held.
nameMeaning.body: The capital base is internal, which allows allocation decisions to follow market evidence rather than external fundraising timelines.

proof.title: Choose the section that matches your objective
proof.intro: Each page has a specific role to support faster orientation and practical follow-through.

items.title: About
items.body: Firm identity, mandate, ownership posture, and leadership accountability.

items.title: Strategy + Markets
items.body: Decision framework and sector coverage with practical context for each focus area.

items.title: Governance + Contact
items.body: Interpretive boundaries, legal notices, and direct correspondence channels.

cta.title: Start with the correct inquiry channel
cta.body: Use dedicated pathways for general correspondence, partnership outreach, and compliance notices.
